news.title:
NTPC achieved record capacity addition of 9.6GW in FY26, including 5.5GW renewable energy.
Coal production grew 6.2% YoY to 48.7 MT; power trading rose 13% YoY to 46.5 BU.
news.summary:
NTPC achieved record capacity addition of 9.6GW in FY26, including 5.5GW renewable energy.
Coal production grew 6.2% YoY to 48.7 MT; power trading rose 13% YoY to 46.5 BU.

news.title:
NTPC group's installed capacity stands at 89,108 MW.
Commercial power generation capacity is reported at 88,028 MW.
news.summary:
NTPC group's installed capacity stands at 89,108 MW.
Commercial power generation capacity is reported at 88,028 MW.

news.title:
NTPC transfers coal mining assets to NTPC Mining Ltd., effective April 1, 2026.
The subsidiary CO completed the asset transfer process for future operations.
news.summary:
NTPC transfers coal mining assets to NTPC Mining Ltd., effective April 1, 2026.
The subsidiary CO completed the asset transfer process for future operations.

news.title:
NTPC transfers coal mining business to NTPC Mining Ltd by Apr 1, 2026.
Pakri Barwadih Coal Mine and HQ shifted to NML; operations start Apr 1, 2026.
news.summary:
NTPC transfers coal mining business to NTPC Mining Ltd by Apr 1, 2026.
Pakri Barwadih Coal Mine and HQ shifted to NML; operations start Apr 1, 2026.

news.title:
NTPC completed transfer of Pakri Barwadih Coal Mine to NTPC Mining Ltd.
Hiving off of NTPC's coal mining business is now fully completed.
news.summary:
NTPC completed transfer of Pakri Barwadih Coal Mine to NTPC Mining Ltd.
Hiving off of NTPC's coal mining business is now fully completed.

news.title:
ONGC achieves gas monetization in Daman Project; Tata Chemicals hits 1M tonnes soda ash production.
BEL secures ₹1660 crore orders; NTPC Green Energy signs MoU with PTC India for renewable energy sales.
news.summary:
ONGC achieves gas monetization in Daman Project; Tata Chemicals hits 1M tonnes soda ash production.
BEL secures ₹1660 crore orders; NTPC Green Energy signs MoU with PTC India for renewable energy sales.

news.title:
Elara Capital identifies 20 stocks with upside potential after market correction due to geopolitical tensions.
Key picks include Maruti Suzuki, Eicher Motors, NTPC, HDFC Bank, and Apollo Hospitals, citing valuation comfort and growth visibility.
news.summary:
Elara Capital identifies 20 stocks with upside potential after market correction due to geopolitical tensions.
Key picks include Maruti Suzuki, Eicher Motors, NTPC, HDFC Bank, and Apollo Hospitals, citing valuation comfort and growth visibility.

news.title:
NTPC declares 37.5 MW solar capacity operational in Gujarat from 2 April 2026.
NTPC also announces 13.2 MW wind capacity operational in Gujarat from the same date.
news.summary:
NTPC declares 37.5 MW solar capacity operational in Gujarat from 2 April 2026.
NTPC also announces 13.2 MW wind capacity operational in Gujarat from the same date.

news.title: NTPC Green inks green ammonia purchase deal with Solar Energy Corporation.
news.summary: NTPC Green inks green ammonia purchase deal with Solar Energy Corporation.

news.title:
NTPC plans to add 1,600 MW at Singrauli Stage III, UP by 2028.
The company already has over 14,000 MW of installed capacity in Uttar Pradesh.
news.summary:
NTPC plans to add 1,600 MW at Singrauli Stage III, UP by 2028.
The company already has over 14,000 MW of installed capacity in Uttar Pradesh.

news.title:
Solarworld Energy secures Rs 177 cr EPC contract for BESS at NTPC Solapur.
The project includes 75 MW/150 MWh BESS at NTPC's Thermal Power Station Lot 2.
news.summary:
Solarworld Energy secures Rs 177 cr EPC contract for BESS at NTPC Solapur.
The project includes 75 MW/150 MWh BESS at NTPC's Thermal Power Station Lot 2.

news.title:
NTPC Ltd announces senior management change under SEBI LODR Regulation 30.
Regional Executive Director Arindam Sinha to superannuate on 31st March 2026.
news.summary:
NTPC Ltd announces senior management change under SEBI LODR Regulation 30.
Regional Executive Director Arindam Sinha to superannuate on 31st March 2026.

news.title: NTPC added 180 MW solar capacity, raising total group capacity to 87,809 MW.
news.summary: NTPC added 180 MW solar capacity, raising total group capacity to 87,809 MW.

news.title:
G R Infra bags Rs 413-cr BESS EPC contract from NTPC for Mouda plant, completion in 15 months.
G R Infra Q3 FY26 net profit up 37.7% YoY; NTPC Q3 FY26 profit rises 8.3%, stock down 0.39%.
news.summary:
G R Infra bags Rs 413-cr BESS EPC contract from NTPC for Mouda plant, completion in 15 months.
G R Infra Q3 FY26 net profit up 37.7% YoY; NTPC Q3 FY26 profit rises 8.3%, stock down 0.39%.

news.title:
NTPC Green Energy declares COD for solar projects in Rajasthan, Gujarat.
NTPC Group capacity reaches 88,889 MW, with 87,809 MW commercial.
news.summary:
NTPC Green Energy declares COD for solar projects in Rajasthan, Gujarat.
NTPC Group capacity reaches 88,889 MW, with 87,809 MW commercial.

news.title:
NTPC approves Rs. 3,173.7 Cr equity for Meja Super Thermal Project expansion.
Ownership in MUNPL JV remains unchanged at 50:50 post investment.
news.summary:
NTPC approves Rs. 3,173.7 Cr equity for Meja Super Thermal Project expansion.
Ownership in MUNPL JV remains unchanged at 50:50 post investment.

news.title:
NTPC's board approved a 4.7 GWh Battery Energy Storage System project costing Rs.5,821.9 Cr.
NTPC also committed Rs.3,173.67 Cr additional equity for Meja Stage II, a 3x800 MW project.
news.summary:
NTPC's board approved a 4.7 GWh Battery Energy Storage System project costing Rs.5,821.9 Cr.
NTPC also committed Rs.3,173.67 Cr additional equity for Meja Stage II, a 3x800 MW project.

news.title:
India delays coal flexibility plan by a year as solar curbs rise.
Regulators address higher retrofitting costs; NTPC Ltd may be impacted.
news.summary:
India delays coal flexibility plan by a year as solar curbs rise.
Regulators address higher retrofitting costs; NTPC Ltd may be impacted.

news.title:
Tata Steel invests ₹1,680.3 cr in T Steel Holdings; TVS Motor approves ₹12/share interim dividend.
HDFC Life faces ₹126.5 cr tax demand; NTPC Green signs MoU with Nxtra; Waaree plans ₹3,900 cr expansion.
news.summary:
Tata Steel invests ₹1,680.3 cr in T Steel Holdings; TVS Motor approves ₹12/share interim dividend.
HDFC Life faces ₹126.5 cr tax demand; NTPC Green signs MoU with Nxtra; Waaree plans ₹3,900 cr expansion.

news.title:
UBS upgrades Power Grid, NTPC, NHPC to 'Buy', citing defensive play and summer demand boost.
Target prices raised: Power Grid Rs 340, NTPC Rs 432, NHPC Rs 88; robust growth visibility cited.
news.summary:
UBS upgrades Power Grid, NTPC, NHPC to 'Buy', citing defensive play and summer demand boost.
Target prices raised: Power Grid Rs 340, NTPC Rs 432, NHPC Rs 88; robust growth visibility cited.
